allow: Bash(Rscript -e 'cat\(R.version.string, "\\n"\); cat\("cmdstanr:", requireNamespace\("cmdstanr", quietly=TRUE\), "\\n"\); cat\("rstan:", requireNamespace\("rstan", quietly=TRUE\), "\\n"\); cat\("posterior:", requireNamespace\("posterior", quietly=TRUE\), "\\n"\); cat\("bayesplot:", requireNamespace\("bayesplot", quietly=TRUE\), "\\n"\)')
Bash(Rscript -e 'library\(rstan\); sm <- stan_model\("log_irt.stan"\); cat\("\\nStan model compiled successfully.\\n"\)')
Bash(Rscript -e 'd <- readRDS\("wordbank_data_subset.rds"\); cat\("data names:", paste\(names\(d$data\), collapse=", "\), "\\n"\)')
Bash(Rscript -e 'd <- readRDS\("wordbank_data_subset.rds"\); cat\("stan data names:\\n", paste\(names\(d$data\), collapse="\\n"\), "\\n"\)')
Bash(xargs -I {} sh -c 'pkill -TERM -P {} 2>/dev/null; kill -TERM {} 2>/dev/null; sleep 3; pkill -KILL -P {} 2>/dev/null; kill -KILL {} 2>/dev/null')
Bash(Rscript -e 'source\("model/R/config.R"\); source\("model/R/helpers.R"\); source\("model/R/ppc.R"\); cat\("All sourced OK\\n"\)')
Bash(Rscript -e 'install.packages\("wordbankr", repos="https://cloud.r-project.org", quiet=TRUE\); cat\("installed:", requireNamespace\("wordbankr", quietly=TRUE\), "\\n"\)')

Bash(Rscript -e 'install.packages\("remotes", repos="https://cloud.r-project.org", quiet=TRUE\); remotes::install_github\("langcog/wordbankr", upgrade="never", quiet=TRUE\); cat\("installed:", requireNamespace\("wordbankr", quietly=TRUE\), "\\n"\)')
Bash(mv analyze_wordbank.R fit_diagnostics.R fit_wordbank.R recovery_test.R recovery_test_v2.R simulate.R log_irt.stan log_irt_v2.stan _old/)

Bash(rm -f log_irt.rds log_irt_v2.rds recovery_fit.rds recovery_sim.rds wordbank_data_subset.rds wordbank_fit_subset.rds recovery_log_alpha.png recovery_psi.png wordbank_class_means.png wordbank_delta.png wordbank_pi_alpha.png wordbank_psi_vs_logp.png wordbank_s.png)

Bash(git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -m "Initial commit: standard_model_2 Bayesian accumulator model of early word learning. Includes: - Cross-sectional log-linear IRT + 2PL + per-child slopes - Longitudinal Stan model \(log_irt_long.stan\) - PPC suite \(variance-by-age, spaghetti marginal, RQ plots\) - sigma_r sensitivity sweep - Sherlock SLURM scripts for remote fitting - Experiments log + durable model explainer ")

Bash(Rscript -e 'source\("model/R/config.R"\); source\("model/R/datasets.R"\); for \(k in names\(DATASETS\)\) cat\(sprintf\("%s -> %s \(exists=%s\)\\n", k, get_dataset\(k\)$path, file.exists\(get_dataset\(k\)$path\)\)\)')
Bash(git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -m 'Parameterize longitudinal pipeline by dataset key; add auth/sync helpers *)
Bash(git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -m 'setup_R.R: install into user R library explicitly *)
Bash(git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -m 'setup_R.R: make Stan pre-compile OOM-tolerant *)
Bash(git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -m 'Sherlock: commit wordbankr/childesr pull outputs, strip them from setup *)
Bash(git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -m 'setup_R.R: drop arrow \(only used by local-only exploration scripts\) *)
Bash(git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -m 'SLURM: auto-symlink repo input bundles into scratch fits dir *)
Bash(git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -m 'SLURM: ln -sfn \(force\) so repeat job submissions don'\\''t fail on existing symlinks *)
Bash(git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -m 'Make Stan iteration count overridable via env vars *)
Bash(git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -m 'Stratified longitudinal sampling: kids by age, items by class x difficulty *)
Bash(git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -m 'Lower default longitudinal fit iterations: 1000/500 for exploration *)
Bash(Rscript -e 'suppressPackageStartupMessages\(library\(rstan\)\); rstan_options\(auto_write = TRUE\); m <- stan_model\("model/stan/log_irt_io.stan"\); cat\("\\nlog_irt_io.stan compiled OK.\\n"\)')
Bash(git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -m 'BabyView pipeline: input-observed model + data prep + fit + SLURM *)
Bash(git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -m 'Document child/item sampling strategy in the explainer *)
Bash(git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -m 'Commit prepared Stan bundles \(incl. babyview\); skip running prep on Sherlock *)
